title: cyclophorus inaequalis
intro: Cyclophorus inaequalis is a species of flowering plant in the family Cyclophoridae, commonly known as a type of land snail shell-bearing orchid. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. The health benefits of Cyclophorus inaequalis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and combat infections. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by boiling the leaves and stems in water, and are often used to make teas or infusions for medicinal purposes.
